title: NOVERIS Landscape Concept Art Pack 20
styleGuide: NOVERIS space scenes: retro-futurist sci-fi concept art, dark cinematic atmosphere, blue-black space, warm amber civilization light, subtle orbital diagrams, painterly premium game key-art finish, minimal editorial composition.

prompts.title: Aurora Gate
prompts.prompt: A colossal orbital gate suspended above an ice planet, ribbons of teal aurora wrapping through the gate structure, amber docking lights, tiny ships entering the aperture, faint orbital diagram lines, premium retro-futurist NOVERIS space concept art, wide 16:9, no text, no logo, no watermark.
